title: Who Owns the Generative AI Platform?
body: Analysis of value capture across the generative AI stack
Infrastructure vendors vs. application companies
Source: Industry analysis report

title: Agenda
body: Value capture dynamics in generative AI
Hardware infrastructure leadership
Application layer economics
Cloud infrastructure spending
Competitive landscape and moats
Market structure outlook

title: Value Capture: Infrastructure Dominance
body: Infrastructure vendors capture the majority of generative AI dollars
App companies grow fast but struggle with retention
App companies face 50-60% gross margins
Infrastructure players extract primary economic value

title: Hardware Leadership: Nvidia's Position
body: Nvidia leads hardware segment
Q3 fiscal 2023 data center GPU revenue: $3.8 billion
GPUs are the fundamental compute layer for generative AI

title: App Layer Economics: Inference Costs
body: App companies spend 20-40% of revenue on inference
Inference represents ongoing operational burden
High infrastructure costs pressure application margins

title: Training Economics: Startup Capital Allocation
body: Training-focused startups dedicate 80-90% of capital to cloud providers
Training represents massive upfront infrastructure investment
Cloud providers capture majority of startup funding

title: Cloud Infrastructure: Big 3 Dominance
body: The Big 3 clouds are AWS, GCP, and Azure
Combined annual capex exceeds $100 billion
Massive capital investment creates infrastructure foundation

title: Cloud Infrastructure: Emerging Challengers
body: Challengers like Coreweave and Lambda Labs are emerging
New specialized cloud providers enter the market
Competition to Big 3 clouds is developing

title: Application Layer: Lack of Differentiation
body: No systemic moats exist yet
Apps use similar models
Limited competitive differentiation at application level

title: Model Layer: Commoditization Risk
body: No systemic moats exist yet
Models train on comparable datasets
Model layer faces commoditization pressure

title: Infrastructure Layer: Limited Moats
body: No systemic moats exist yet
Clouds run identical GPUs
Even infrastructure layer lacks strong differentiation

title: Market Structure Outlook
body: Many successful players are expected across all stack levels
Market structure will not be winner-take-all
Multiple winners anticipated at each layer of the stack
